titleStmt.title: SII 36.239: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 239. (A.R. No. 239 of 1910.) NARASIṄGAPURAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Narasimha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: (Śaka 1457, Manmatha, Simham, śu., 12, Wednesday, Tiruvōṇam = A.D. 1535, August 11, Wednesday.)

The inscription is partly damaged and incomplete. Gift of land and house sites to six (?) śrīvaishṇava-brāhmaṇas of Narasānāyakapuram by Tītta[ra*] Piḷḷai of Kāñchipuram, the secretary of the king, Achchyutadēvarāya for the merit of Periyasvāmi Narasā Nāyakar. The grant was instituted on the occasion of the consecration of the processional image (utsavabhēra) of the presiding deity with the name, Prahalādhapurandara in the Lakshminārāsimha Perumāḷ temple at Kūvam also known as Tyāgasamudranallūr, in Kaṉṟūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Teṉkarai Maṇavilkōṭṭam in Chandragiri-rājya, of Ja[ya]ṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī man mahāmaṇḍaleśvarā rājāthirāja parameśvara śrī vīrapratāpa Accutaiyadeva mahārāyar prativirājyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 7 rūpāy mel cellāniṉṟa maṉmata samvatasarattu simhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu dvādaśiyum putan kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu ṉāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu cantrakiri rājyattu teṉkarai maṇavil koṭṭattu kaṉṟūr ṉāṭṭuk kūvam tyāgasamudra nallūṟku pratināmamāṉa narasānāyakkapurattu lakṣminārasimha perumāḷiṭaya Utsavaberamāṉa prahalātapuran
tara tirupratiṣṭa kālattile periyasvāmi narasānāyakkaṟku puṇyamāka prahalātapuran=tara tirukkaivaḻakkamāṉa daśadānattil bhūdānattukku Accutadeva mahārāyar kāriyattukku karttarāṉa kāñcipuram tīttārapiḷḷai svāmi Accutadeva mahārāyaruttārappaṭikku narasānāyakkapurattile nityavāsam paṇṇikkoṇṭu Irukkiṟa śrīvaiṣṇavar taṅkaḷukku dharmmaśāsanam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi bhāradvāja gotrattu Āpastamba sūtrattu nayiṉṉārayyaṅkār putrar Appaiyaṅkāṟku vaṭakkut teru vītiyil meṟku mutal mūṉṟu
mmaṉaiyum melai muppattāṟaṭik kolile tribhuvaṉamātevi viḷākattil ceṟukkiḻāṉettamāṉa koṭṭaikāṟaṉ vaṭakkaṭaya kuḻi 3 10 2 puṅkar kuṇṭil kuḻi 10 8 coḻakulavalli viḷākattil melai vaṇṇār mōḻai kuḻi 4 10 3 Itaṉ meṟku tiruviḷaiyāṭṭattile vaṭakkaṭaya kuḻi 7 Ākkuparama kuṇṭiṉa gotrattu Āpastamaba sūtrattu Appaiyaṅkār putrar nayiṉārayyaṅkāṟkku sannati teruvil teṉciṟakil meṟku mutal Āṟu maṉaiyum narasānāyakkarettu E
kiḻaṅūrṉilattile rājendraśoḻa viḷākattil cevvaripaḷḷam mataṉ peruñceṟil vaṭakkaṭaya pe m rājasaundarya viḷākattil pūcaṇikkuṇṭil kuḻi 10 8m coḻakulavalli viḷākattil śatukuṇṭil melai puḷiyaṅkuṇṭil kiḻakkaṭaya kuḻi 10 3 mukkāl 4mām kīḻaip puḷiyaṅkuṇṭil meṟkaṭaya kuḻi 10 3 Āka kuḻi 100m bhāradvāja gotrattu Āpastambha sūtrattu ṉāyiṉārayyaṅkār putrar Appāvayyaṅkāṟku tribhuvanamātevi viḷākattil cekkiḻāṉ koṭṭaikkāṟaṉ kuḻi 2 10 2m kaḷḷiyum Iṭaiyūr kuḻi 2 10 8m coḻakulavalli viḷākattil
kīḻai vaṇṇāk moḻai nilam tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam kuḻi 2 10m Āka kuḻi 100m kuṇṭiṉa gotrattu Ābhastamba sūtrattu mapiyerāyaṅkār putrar nimmāyaṅkāruḷḷiṭṭāṟku vaṭakkut taitiruvītiyil meṟku mutal raṇṭām maṉaiyum [ radiyūr] viḷākattu Amaṇpaṭṭi kuḻi 2 10 3vum yitiṉ teṟku kuḻi 10 4m mūlaik kāmpoti viḷākam kuḻi m rājendraśoḻa viḷākattu cevvaripaḷḷam mataṉ peruñceṟivil kuḻi 3 10 8m Āka kuḻi 9 10m kuṇṭiṉa gotrattu piḷḷaiyaṅkā nayiṉārayyaṅkāṟku rāja saundarya viḷākattu kāmpoti viḷākam kuḻi 2 10 3m cevvalli
yittaṇiyal kuḻi 3 m nidrāvina gotratu varatar putrar perreṟṟu ṉāyiṉāṟku sannithi teruvilteṉ ceṟakil meṟ maṉaiyum tribhuvaṉamātevi viḷākattu cekiḻānettam kuḻi 2 10 2 Araim ciṟukiṇaṟu kuḻi 4 10 Arail meṟkaṭaiya kuḻi 3 Araim Āka kuḻi 100m kuṇṭina gotra yyaṅkāṟ vaiyyaṅkār kuḻi gotrattu ṉā vaṇ na
Digital edition of SII 36.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
